items.title: US judge orders Trump administration to reopen Voice of America
items.dek: Some 85% of VOA staff were laid off by Trump who accused the international broadcaster of bias.

items.title: Trucks driver parked for mocking IndyCar racer
items.dek: NASCAR driver Daniel Dye has been suspended -- the second known major penalty of his racing career -- for mocking IndyCar driver David Malukas during a recent l
items.body: NASCAR driver Daniel Dye has been suspended -- the second known major penalty of his racing career -- for mocking IndyCar driver David Malukas during a recent livestream.
